allow: Bash(docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U oddscast -d oddscast)
Bash(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U oddscast -d oddscast -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=''oddscast'' AND table_name=''users'' LIMIT 1")
Bash(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U oddscast -d oddscast -tAc "SELECT ""loginId"", name FROM oddscast.admin_users LIMIT 5")

Bash(docker compose exec -T postgres psql -U oddscast -d oddscast -c "INSERT INTO oddscast.admin_users \(""loginId"",password,name\) VALUES \(''admin'',''$2b$10$W758e6SSlEFec.GsYHILtOW3D.OvgjwtyyEAQFQttwa3ly1JIQCXO'',''Administrator''\) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;")
